title: solanum supinum var. lyratifolium
intro: Solanum supinum var. lyratifolium is a variety of the Solanum supinum plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the nightshade family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Solanum supinum var. lyratifolium include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate congestion, and soothe coughs. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote respiratory health.
